jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - AIIMS - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
AIIMS, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Senior Doctor for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About AIIMS:
AIIMS is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Health Informatics

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Referral bonus program
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
